generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNanoActuationPlatform : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Upper-level autonomy platform handling ACC logic and ROS2-based control for adaptive cruise control actuation via cloud-based compute (NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano)."
]

instance TraxxasChassisActuation : DTDFVocab:ActuatingComponent [
    base:desc "Lower-level chassis component managing steering and speed control via motor and servo actuators for the 1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle."
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActuatingComponent [
    base:desc "Speed control component interfacing with motor systems for precise speed regulation in the autonomous vehicle chassis."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard LiDAR sensor (Hokuyo UST-10LX) for object detection in the autonomous vehicle's environment."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Depth camera (Intel Deepsense D435i) providing environmental perception data for autonomous vehicle navigation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraData
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor measuring vehicle speed (km/h) for ego-vehicle state monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor measuring steering angle (degrees) for vehicle control feedback."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
    DTDFVocab:unit meters
    DTDFVocab:frequency 10Hz
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
    DTDFVocab:unit millimeters
    DTDFVocab:frequency 30Hz
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
    DTDFVocab:unit km/h
    DTDFVocab:frequency 100Hz
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
    DTDFVocab:unit degrees
    DTDFVocab:frequency 100Hz
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARPointCloudData, DepthCameraData
    DTDFVocab:unit meters
    DTDFVocab:frequency 10Hz
]

instance DataTranslationISO23247 : DTDFocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFocab:producedFrom LiDARPointCloudData, ObjectTrackData, VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData
    DTDFocab:unitConversion LiDARCoordinatesToVehicleLocalFrames
    DTDFocab:messageTypeAlignment ROS2MessageTypes
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance DBSCANPointCloudClustering : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Point cloud clustering algorithm (DBSCAN) for object detection from LiDAR data in the autonomous vehicle's environment."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationISO23247
]

instance KalmanFilterObjectTracking : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter implementation for tracking detected objects across frames in the autonomous vehicle's perception system."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationISO23247
]

instance ISO15622ACCControlLogic : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant adaptive cruise control logic (performance class I) for lead vehicle detection and speed calculation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationISO23247
]

instance SQLObjectTrackDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing object tracks and ego-vehicle state externally to the vehicle for historical analysis and troubleshooting."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackData, VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:storageType Relational
]

instance ROS2VisualizationPipeline : DTDFocab:Data [
    base:desc "ROS2-based 3D visualization pipeline for real-time rendering of ego-vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path."
    DTDFocab:fromData ObjectTrackData, VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData
    DTDFocab:renderingFormat OpenGL
]

instance PointCloudClusteringReport : DTDFocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series report generated from DBSCAN clustering results for troubleshooting and validation."
    DTDFocab:fromData DBSCANPointCloudClustering
    DTDFocab:reportType PerformanceMetrics
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 (ROS2) for inter-entity communication and component orchestration in the autonomous vehicle's digital twin architecture."
    DTDFocab:enables ROS2DataCollection, ROS2ControlInterface
]

instance Python38Prototyping : DTDFocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 environment for rapid prototyping of data processing and visualization components in the digital twin."
    DTDFocab:enables PythonDataPreProcessing, PythonVisualizationFE
]

instance CPlusPlusROS2Lifecycle : DTDFocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ implementation of ROS2 lifecycle management for robust component lifecycle handling in the autonomous vehicle's digital twin."
    DTDFocab:enables CPlusPlusDataTranslation, CPlusPlusControlInterface
]

instance MATLABSimulinkComplexSystems : DTDFocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment for complex systems modeling including point cloud clustering and ACC logic validation."
    DTDFocab:enables MATLABPointCloudProcessing, SimulinkACCValidation
]

instance DataTranslationISO23247FE : DTDFocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Translation Feature Engine implementing ISO 23247 standards for message type alignment and unit conversions between vehicle and digital twin."
    DTDFocab:enables ISO23247DataAlignment
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization service providing monitoring of ego-vehicle state (speed, steering angle), detected object tracks, and projected driving path."
    DTDFocab:provides EgoVehicleStateVisualization, ObjectTrackVisualization
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service offloading ACC logic (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation) from vehicle ECUs to cloud-based NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano hardware."
    DTDFocab:provides CloudACCProcessing
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management interface enabling operators to disable/enable ACC, set desired speed, or trigger emergency braking via Control Panel UI."
    DTDFocab:provides OperatorCommandProcessing, TroubleshootingDataCollection
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance EgoVehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time insight into the autonomous vehicle's current speed and steering angle for operational monitoring."
]

instance ObjectTrackInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected object tracks showing position, velocity, and size in the vehicle's environment for collision avoidance."
]

instance DrivingPathProjection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected driving path visualization showing planned trajectory based on current speed and steering inputs."
]

instance ACCPerformanceOptimization : DTDFocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic action to optimize ACC performance by adjusting speed based on lead vehicle detection and ISO 15622 compliance."
    DTDFocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EmergencyBrakingTrigger : DTDFocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual action triggered by operator to initiate emergency braking when safety conditions are detected."
    DTDFocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ACCEnableDisableCommand : DTDFocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote command to enable or disable adaptive cruise control functionality."
    DTDFocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SpeedSettingCommand : DTDFocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote command to set desired cruise control speed for the autonomous vehicle."
    DTDFocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C17: Environment
instance AutonomousVehicleDigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains NVIDIAJetsonOrinNanoActuationPlatform, TraxxasChassisActuation, VedderElectronicSpeedController,
        HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor,
        ROS2Middleware, Python38Prototyping, CPlusPlusROS2Lifecycle, MATLABSimulinkComplexSystems,
        DataTranslationISO23247FE, DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService,
        DBSCANPointCloudClustering, KalmanFilterObjectTracking, ISO15622ACCControlLogic, SQLObjectTrackDatabase,
        ROS2VisualizationPipeline, PointCloudClusteringReport
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFocab:Environment [
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, TraxxasChassisActuation,
        VedderElectronicSpeedController, DBSCANPointCloudClustering, KalmanFilterObjectTracking,
        PointCloudClusteringReport, DataTranslationISO23247FE
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT sends commands to the PT via:
  - **Desired speed adjustments** (via ACC Controlling FE) to the vehicle’s motor actuator (converted to voltage commands by the **Actuation FE**).
  - **Emergency braking commands** and **ACC enable/disable toggles** through the **Control Panel UI FE** (User Interface FE in ISO 23247).
  - **Latency-constrained communication**: End-to-end latency ≤ 100 ms (3GPP TS 22.185 compliance) for real-time control."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates at **real-time granularity** with:
  - **Data collection rate**: Object tracks and ego-vehicle state updated every **perception cycle** (not explicitly quantified but aligned with ACC control loop frequency, typically <100 ms).
  - **Synchronization accuracy**: Clock synchronization between PT and DT entities requires **≤100 ms accuracy** (due to hardware limitations), ensuring event ordering and data integrity."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is structured as a **three-entity hierarchy** (ISO 23247-inspired):
  1. **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts sensor processing (LiDAR/Depth Camera data) and actuation (motor/servo commands) via ROS2 packages.
  2. **Digital Twin Entity**: Manages data collection (object/vehicle state), reporting (SQL database), and ACC control logic (ISO 23247 Controlling FE).
  3. **User Entity**: Provides two sub-FEs:
     - **3D Visualization FE** (User Interface FE) for real-time rendering.
     - **Control Panel FE** (User Interface FE) for remote management (enable/disable ACC, set speed, emergency braking).
  Inter-entity communication uses **Wi-Fi** (UDP-based) for low-latency (<100 ms) data exchange between the vehicle and cloud-based DT."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates across the following lifecycle stages:
  - **Design Phase**: Used as a cyber-physical experimentation platform for ACC logic validation and simulation (e.g., ISO 15622 compliance).
  - **Operational Phase**: Enables real-time monitoring, remote management, and predictive troubleshooting during vehicle operation. The DT covers the 'as-operated' lifecycle stage, focusing on runtime performance and safety validation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Verification**: ISO 15622-compliant ACC control logic (performance class I) validated via 1/10th-scale testing.
  - **Validation**: Real-time data collection (LiDAR/Depth Camera) and 3D visualization accuracy tested via on-board camera correlation.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: Object tracking relies on DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filters to mitigate noise in LiDAR point clouds.
  - **Error Mitigation**: Data Translation FE standardizes units (e.g., LiDAR coordinates) to prevent misinterpretation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs a **hybrid network architecture**:
  - **Onboard Communication**: ROS2 network for intra-vehicle component communication (e.g., sensor data to Physical Twin Entity).
  - **Inter-Entity Communication**: Wi-Fi (UDP-based) for low-latency (<100 ms) data exchange between the vehicle and cloud-based DT.
  - **Protocols**: ROS2 (ROS 2.0) for middleware, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication, and **Data Translation FE** for serialization/unit conversion."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed in a **cloud-edge hybrid model**:
  - **Edge Layer**: NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano (cloud-based compute) and Jetson NX (onboard sensor processing) for real-time processing.
  - **Cloud Layer**: External storage (SQL database) for historical data and report generation.
  - **Deployment Tools**: ROS2 for component orchestration, Python/C++ for FE implementations, and MATLAB/Simulink for complex algorithms (e.g., point cloud clustering)."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT integrates horizontally with:
  - **External Systems**: No explicit mention of integration with other DTs or external information systems (e.g., fleet coordination, cloud-based analytics). Potential future integration could include:
    - **Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) communication** (3GPP TS 22.185 compliance for latency).
    - **Cloud-based analytics** for large-scale fleet monitoring."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership and privacy are addressed by:
  - **Ownership**: Data is stored externally and managed by the DT service provider, with no explicit mention of ISO/SAE 21434 compliance in the documents.
  - **Privacy**: No specific privacy protocols are detailed; the system focuses on real-time data exchange for operational purposes."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT follows **ISO 23247** (Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework) for reference architecture, with adaptations for automotive systems (e.g., Physical Twin Entity). Additional standards include ISO 15622 (ACC), ROS2, and 3GPP TS 22.185 (V2V communication)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
  - **Safety-Critical Design**: ACC logic adheres to ISO 15622 (performance class I), ensuring safe following distance.
  - **Latency Constraints**: End-to-end latency ≤100 ms (3GPP TS 22.185) to prevent catastrophic failures.
  - **Remote Operation**: Emergency braking and ACC disable commands are validated before execution to mitigate risks.
  - **Data Integrity**: Clock synchronization (≤100 ms accuracy) ensures event ordering and prevents replay attacks.
  - **Human-in-the-Loop**: DT falls under the **Fully Autonomous Digital Twin (Human-in-the-Loop)** taxonomy (David & Bork [30]), with operators monitoring critical decisions."
]
